_instructions: Replace this file with: gh issue view <NUM> --json number,title,labels,body,createdAt,state,url
_command: ISSUE_NUM=$(gh issue list --label 'type:security,priority:high,bot:cf-audit-log-monitor' --json number --jq '.[0].number'); gh issue view "$ISSUE_NUM" --json number,title,labels,body,createdAt,state,url > outputs/phase-11/synthetic-high-event-issue.json

_expected_shape.title: [cf-audit-log-monitor] HIGH: unexpected IP authentication success
_expected_shape.body:
Detected at: ...
Fingerprint: <hash>
Severity: HIGH
Resource: <redacted>
IP: <redacted-prefix>

_notes: body には fingerprint hash を含むこと
raw IP / user agent / token 値を Issue body に含めない（prefix のみ・redact 済の表現）
labels に priority:high と type:security の両方を含むこと
